word: keep track of and stay on top of
definitions: 持续跟进并确保一切尽在掌握

examples.text: There are many things to keep track of and stay on top of.
examples.explanation: 有许多事情需要持续跟进并确保一切尽在掌握。
focusWords: keep track of and stay on top of

reviewSessions.word: keep track of and stay on top of
reviewSessions.example_text: There are many things to keep track of and stay on top of.
expected_definitions: 持续跟进并确保一切尽在掌握
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案抓住了“跟进”这一核心，但缺少“持续记录/掌握进展、确保不失控”的意思，不够完整。
matched_points: 表达了“跟进”的核心含义
missing_points: 缺少“持续记录/追踪”的意思
缺少“确保一切尽在掌握、及时处理”的意思
